jobs.title: Commercial Growth Account Executive (Spanish Speaker)
jobs.description: <p>We are searching for an ambitious Commercial Growth Account Executive. Your role will primarily be identifying new workloads to expand MongoDB's usage into accounts that are already leveraging our Database as a Service (DBaaS), Atlas, in a self-serve manner. You'll focus on helping customers understand the continuous evolution of our developer data platform and its additional features that could be leveraged for their specific use cases. You will support customers at any stage of their journey, fostering greater adoption, retention, and overall satisfaction. This role provides an excellent opportunity for growth in a highly dynamic sales team.</p> <p>We are looking to speak to candidates who are based in Dublin for our hybrid working model.</p> <h3>Day to Day:</h3> <ul> <li>Identify new workloads and potential use cases within existing accounts to drive increased Atlas consumption via your own pipeline generation and outbound activities</li> <li>Articulate the value of MongoDB's expanded feature set and evolving developer data platform</li> <li>Support customers throughout their journey, addressing any queries and ensuring optimal product usage</li> <li>Develop relationships within customer accounts to promote greater visibility and deepen the partnership between MongoDB and your account's decision-makers</li> <li>Strategically navigate diverse industries with a data-driven discovery and sales process to help land and expand customer workloads</li> </ul> <h3>What you bring to the table:</h3> <ul> <li>At least 1 years of Sales experience, with a preference for database or software</li> <li>Consistent record of meeting or exceeding targets in a highly competitive environment (top 10% performer)</li> <li>Dynamic, enthusiastic, tenacious, team-oriented mindset</li> <li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills</li> <li>Experience working within a quota and commission structure</li> <li>College degree or equivalent work experience</li> <li>High EQ, coachability, intellectual curiosity, and motivation to build a career at MongoDB</li> <li>Native Spanish speaker</li> </ul> <h3>Things we love:</h3> <ul> <li>Familiarity with database, developer personas, and open-source technology</li> <li>Experience with sales tech stack tools like Salesforce.com, Outreach, and Chorus.ai</li> </ul> <h3>Why You Should Apply:</h3> <ul> <li>We offer an industry-leading onboarding process for Associate Commercial Growth AE’s that prioritizes professional development</li> <li>High earning potential and a welcoming, inclusive workplace<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w8fOfvvUcko&amp;list=PL4RCxklHWZ9s9TQD1hPFWdOOwZuECDQb1&amp;index=39"> Meet MongoDB’s Employee Affinity Groups!</a></li> <li>Continuous career development, sales training in MEDDPIC, and Command of the Message</li> <li>Benefits include:</li> <ul> <li>Sales Bootcamp</li> <li>Cross-departmental mentor and buddy programs</li> </ul> <li>Join us at MongoDB, where your work matters, your individuality is embraced, and you have the freedom to create. You'll be a part of a culture that values your wellbeing and supports your professional and personal journey. We’re committed to making a real-world impact, and we can't wait to see what kind of difference you can make. Learn more about working at MongoDB and help us transform the world!</li> </ul> <h3>About MongoDB</h3> <p>MongoDB is built for change, empowering our customers and our people to innovate at the speed of the market. We have redefined the database for the AI era, enabling innovators to create, transform, and disrupt industries with software. MongoDB’s unified database platform, the most widely available, globally distributed database on the market, helps organizations modernize legacy workloads, embrace innovation, and unleash AI. Our cloud-native platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi-cloud database and is available across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.</p> <p>With offices worldwide and over 60,000 customers, including 75% of the Fortune 100 and AI-native startups, relying on MongoDB for their most important applications, we’re powering the next era of software.</p> <p>Our compass at MongoDB is our <a href="https://www.mongodb.com/company">Leadership Commitment,</a> guiding how and why we make decisions, show up for each other, and win. It’s what makes us MongoDB.&nbsp;</p> <p>To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. <a href="https://www.mongodb.com/company/blog/culture/employee-benefits-that-make-a-difference-at-mongodb">From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy</a>, we value our employees’ wellbeing and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys.<a href="https://www.mongodb.com/blog/channel/culture"> Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB</a>, and help us make an impact on the world!</p> <p>MongoDB is committed to providing any necessary accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.</p> <p>MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer.</p> <p><em>Req ID: 426217</em></p>

jobs.title: Manager, Sales Development
jobs.description: <p>The worldwide data management software market is massive (According to IDC, the worldwide database software market, which it refers to as the database management systems software market, was forecasted to be approximately $82 billion in 2023 growing to approximately $137 billion in 2027. This represents a 14% compound annual growth rate). At MongoDB we are transforming industries and empowering developers to build amazing apps that people use every day. We are the leading developer data platform and the first database provider to IPO in over 20 years. Join our team and be at the forefront of innovation and creativity.</p> <p>We’re looking for a dynamic and empowering Sales Development Manager who will be responsible for building and leading a team of enterprise ADRs. The role focuses on leadership, development and a high performance culture to execute against our rapid sales goals.</p> <h3><strong>The Opportunity</strong></h3> <p>In this role, you will have two core priorities: Talent Development &amp; Revenue Development. We view our Account Development Representatives as the next wave of Account Executives at MongoDB. A Sales Development leader at MongoDB hires outstanding talent, maps out the gaps in that rep’s skillset, holds them accountable to reaching their potential, and takes pride in turning that ADR into an AE. You will also be a key asset to our Enterprise Sales organization, partnering with regional leaders across our sales organization, you will be a crucial part of uncovering new opportunities, determining how to unlock new territories, and driving revenue into our pipeline.</p> <h3><strong>Day to Day</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Attract, hire, retain, and develop talent&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide strong coaching and mentoring through a deep understanding of sales, our business model, and our sales methodology&nbsp;</li> <li>Be involved in prospect qualification and discovery calls/meetings&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide weekly team performance summary as well as timely and accurate forecast to senior management&nbsp;</li> <li>Cross functional collaboration to establish scalable processes for incoming lead management and follow-up SLAs and conversions</li> <li>Develop and own KPI’s, supervise the activity of the team, track the results and drive team execution based on those metrics</li> <li>Work closely with Field Sales and Inside Sales management to drive increased performance and align pipeline production to our Sales team's needs</li> <li>Invest in your self-development, focusing on the skills and attributes that will make you successful in your core role and get you set for future success</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What You Will Bring to the Table</strong></h3> <ul> <li>2+ years experience prospecting as an individual contributor and closing</li> <li>2+ years experience leading/managing with a track record in hiring, developing and promoting</li> <li>Complex enterprise software experience in a comparable company (technical and multi level decision making)</li> <li>Experience in open source software sales is a distinct advantage</li> <li>Excellent verbal, written, listening, and presentation skills. You must be credible with direct reports, customers, recruitment candidates, and internally across the organization at all levels including senior management</li> <li>Top performer, Results oriented, with a track record of overachievement (President’s Club, Rep of the Year, etc.)</li> <li>Experience using and implementing a sales methodology</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Things We Love</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Familiarity with database, web server, and open source technology</li> <li>Working experience with Salesforce.com</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Why You Should Apply</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Great Earning Potential</li> <li>Welcoming and inclusive workplace&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w8fOfvvUcko&amp;list=PL4RCxklHWZ9s9TQD1hPFWdOOwZuECDQb1&amp;index=39">Meet MongoDB’s Employee Affinity Groups!</a></li> <li>Continuous career development</li> <li>Sales training in MEDDIC and Command of the Message</li> <li>Benefits include</li> <li>Sales Bootcamp</li> <li>Internal mentor and buddy program cross-departmentally</li> </ul> <p>To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy, we value our employees’ wellbeing and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys.<a href="https://www.mongodb.com/blog/channel/culture"> Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB</a>, and help us make an impact on the world!</p> <p>MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer.</p> <p><em>Req ID: 426213</em></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>MongoDB’s base salary range for this role is posted below. Compensation at the time of offer is unique to each candidate and based on a variety of factors such as skill set, experience, qualifications, and work location. Salary is one part of MongoDB’s total compensation and benefits package. Other benefits for eligible employees may include: equity, participation in the employee stock purchase program, flexible paid time off, 20 weeks fully-paid gender-neutral parental leave, fertility and adoption assistance, 401(k) plan, mental health counseling, access to transgender-inclusive health insurance coverage, and health benefits offerings. Please note, the base salary range listed below and the benefits in this paragraph are only applicable to U.S.-based candidates.</p></div><div class="title">MongoDB’s base salary range for this role in the U.S. is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$110,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$110,000 USD</span></div></div></div>

Compensation at the time of offer is unique to each candidate and based on a variety of factors such as skill set, experience, qualifications, and work location. Salary is one part of MongoDB’s total compensation and benefits package. Other benefits for eligible employees may include: equity, participation in the employee stock purchase program, flexible paid time off, 20 weeks fully-paid gender-neutral parental leave, fertility and adoption assistance, Registered Retirement Savings Plan (RRSP) with employer match, mental health counseling, backup child and elder care, and health, dental, and vision benefits offerings. Please note, the base salary range listed below and the benefits in this paragraph are only applicable to candidates based in Canada.</p></div><div class="title">MongoDB’s base salary range for this role in Canada is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$120,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$120,000 CAD</span></div></div></div>

jobs.title: Manager, Sales Development (Kuala Lumpur Based)
jobs.description: <p><strong>Manager, Sales Development</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About MongoDB</strong></p> <p>MongoDB is built for change, empowering our customers and our people to innovate at the speed of the market. We have redefined the database for the AI era, enabling innovators to create, transform, and disrupt industries with software. MongoDB’s unified database platform, the most widely available, globally distributed database on the market, helps organizations modernize legacy workloads, embrace innovation, and unleash AI. Our cloud-native platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi-cloud database and is available across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.</p> <p>With offices worldwide and over 60,000 customers, including 75% of the Fortune 100 and AI-native startups, relying on MongoDB for their most important applications, we’re powering the next era of software.</p> <p><strong>The Opportunity:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking a dynamic, results-driven leader with exceptional energy, passion, and initiative to oversee a team of Sales Development Managers for MongoDB, the world’s fastest-growing database.As the Manager of Sales Development, this role will emphasize developing top-tier talent, driving team performance, and advancing sales pipeline goals to support MongoDB’s continued momentum. Qualified candidates will be based in our Kuala Lumpur office and are open to a flexible, hybrid work schedule that includes regular in-office collaboration.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Day to Day</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Attract, hire, retain, and develop talent&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide strong coaching and mentoring through a deep understanding of sales, our business model, and our sales methodology.&nbsp;</li> <li>Be involved in prospect qualification and discovery calls/meetings&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide weekly team performance summary as well as timely and accurate forecast to senior management based&nbsp;</li> <li>Cross functional collaboration to establish scalable processes for incoming lead management and follow-up SLAs and conversions</li> <li>Develop and own KPI’s, supervise the activity of the team, track the results and drive team execution based on those metrics</li> <li>Work closely with Field Sales and Inside Sales management to drive increased performance and align pipeline production to our Sales team's needs</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Invest in your self-development, focusing on the skills and attributes that will make you successful in your core role and get you set for future success</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p><strong>What You Will Bring to the Table</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>2+ years experience prospecting as an individual contributor and closing</li> <li>2+ years experience leading/managing with a track record in hiring, developing and promoting is a plus</li> <li>Complex enterprise software experience in a comparable company (technical and multi- level decision making)</li> <li>Experience in open source software sales is a distinct advantage</li> <li>Excellent verbal, written, listening, and presentation skills. You must be credible with direct reports, customers, recruitment candidates, and internally across the organization at all levels including senior management</li> <li>Top performer, Results oriented, with a track record of overachievement (President’s Club, Rep of the Year, etc.)</li> <li>Experience using and implementing a sales methodology (MEDDICC, SPIN, Challenger…)</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Things We Love</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Familiarity with database, web server, and open source technology</li> <li>Working experience with Salesforce.com</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p><strong>Why You Should Apply</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>MongoDB invests heavily in the development of each of our new hires &amp; continuous career development</li> <li>Best in breed Sales trainings in MEDDIC and Command of the Message, including our comprehensive Sales Bootcamps and development programs</li> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan</li> <li>Generous and competitive benefits (parental leave, fertility &amp; wellbeing support)</li> <li>Friendly and inclusive workplace culture -<a href="https://www.mongodb.com/blog/channel/culture"> Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB</a></li> <li>To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy, we value our employees’ well-being and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys.<a href="https://www.mongodb.com/blog/channel/culture"> Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB</a>, and help us make an impact on the world!</li> <li>MongoDB is committed to providing any necessary accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>"MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer."</p>

jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><p><strong>About the Account Management Team</strong></p> <p>The Account Management team covers roughly 25% of Mixpanel's global ARR, across our customer base in EMEA. The team is focused on retaining and growing this book of business, through ensuring a smooth onboarding process, understanding how our customers get the most value out of Mixpanel's capabilities, driving adoption, and uncovering growth opportunities.</p> <p>The AM team has developed a strong community of practice in collaboration with the Customer Success team EMEA and globally.&nbsp; The team works on individual targets but also values and cultivates a team culture where sharing knowledge and supporting others is a critical part of individual success</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>As an Account Manager, you will partner closely with Mixpanel's customers&nbsp;<strong>across DACH</strong>, ultimately driving long-term customer success and increased revenue under your management. Mixpanel Account Managers have a strong understanding of our product's capabilities and are able to continuously uncover areas of value for our customers.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Owns and maintains the relationship with director and executive-level economic buyers at their accounts by connecting their objectives with the value that Mixpanel provides to their teams</li> <li>Builds and maintains a long-term account plan and strategy focused on product adoption, driving business value, and discovering growth opportunities across a book of 40-75 accounts with a value between $2M-$3M</li> <li>Maintains accurate Salesforce records related to Renewal, Upsell, and Churn opportunities, and delivers accurate weekly forecasts related to revenue targets</li> <li>Acts as a data and analytics thought leader and partner to their accounts through use cases and business impact</li> <li>Host analytics workshops, brainstorms, and product trainings to ensure end users adopt and use Mixpanel</li> <li>Takes ownership of a customer's account health and pulls all levers to increase health - from helping coach a customer through implementation to addressing adoption challenges through training to supporting their analytics strategy.</li> <li>Keep customers informed of new product releases, relevant betas, and upcoming features</li> <li>Collect and consolidate customer product feedback and champion the needs of your portfolio with Mixpanel’s Engineering and Product organizations</li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with key partners such as, Customer Success, Sales Engineering, Professional Services, Product, Marketing, and Legal.</li> <li>Intimately understands Mixpanel's competitors and technology partners to consult customers on our place in the broader analytics market.</li> </ul> <p><strong>We're Looking For Someone Who Has</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of related work experience and emerging knowledge in full cycle SaaS post sales customer management experience, as an Account Manager or related cross-functional role like Customer Success Manager.</li> <li>Experience managing a book of business in the $1M-$2.5M range.</li> <li>Able to build and maintain credibility with a technical end-user in Engineering, Product, and Design functions, by showcasing Product and Industry knowledge and expertise.</li> <li>Effective communicator and collaborator — you have strong interpersonal skills and are an excellent team player.</li> <li>Adaptability — you understand that change is constant, and you embrace it.</li> <li>Agility and resilience — you move quickly and encourage continued improvement.</li> <li>Strong work ethic, desire to learn, and a drive to excel.</li> <li>Curiosity for the product analytics space.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus Points For</strong></p> <ul> <li>Fluency in multiple languages, German preferred</li> <li>Experience managing relationships with high growth tech companies.</li> <li>Experience with Mixpanel or other analytics tools.</li> <li>Experience in a technical customer-facing role (Support Engineer / Customer Success Manager / Sales Engineer / Solutions Architect).</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Manager, Solutions Engineering
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>As a Manager on the Solutions Engineering team at Mixpanel, you will lead a talented group of analytics consultants who are pivotal to our success. You will be at the forefront of driving customer value, guiding your team as they serve as the primary technical resources for our Sales organization.&nbsp;</p> <p>This role is a unique blend of leadership, technical expertise, and business strategy. You will be responsible for coaching and developing your team, refining our technical sales processes, and collaborating across departments to ensure our customers achieve their business outcomes with Mixpanel.&nbsp;</p> <p>You will also play a key role in hiring, onboarding, and managing the next wave of Solutions Engineers. By fostering a culture of excellence and deep customer empathy, you will empower your team to architect innovative solutions, drive product adoption, and ultimately secure the technical win with prospects and customers.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Develop &amp; Mentor: </strong>Lead, coach, and grow a high-performing and inclusive team of Solutions Engineers, actively investing in their career development and upholding a high standard of performance.</li> <li><strong>Drive Results:</strong> Partner closely with Sales leadership and Account Executives to provide technical expertise that drives new, retained, and expansion ARR. You will ensure your team's activities are directly contributing to the company's bottom line.</li> <li><strong>Prioritize &amp; Problem Solve: </strong>Guide your team through complex customer evaluations and technical challenges. You will manage team resources effectively, aligning the right skills to customer needs to achieve productivity targets and successful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Partnership:</strong> Act as a key technical liaison, collaborating with peer managers across Sales, Product, and Engineering. You will gather and synthesize customer feedback from your team to influence product strategy and solve problems at scale.</li> <li><strong>Communicate &amp; Manage Change:</strong> Effectively translate broader company and departmental strategy into clear, actionable goals for your team. You will guide your direct reports through evolving business priorities with empathy and clarity.</li> <li><strong>Hire the Best:</strong> Actively assess the needs of the team, build a pipeline of top talent, and hire outstanding individuals who elevate the team's capabilities and contribute to our inclusive culture.</li> <li><strong>Innovate &amp; Raise the Bar:</strong> Relentlessly seek to improve how your team operates, from refining demo strategies and proof-of-concept methodologies to adopting new tools and processes that increase effectiveness and celebrate success.</li> </ul> <p><strong>We’re Looking For Someone Who</strong></p> <ul> <li>Has progressive experience in a B2B SaaS environment, including 3+ years of people management experience leading a technical pre-sales, solutions engineering, or professional services team.</li> <li>Exhibits a "player-coach" mentality with deep knowledge in the data and analytics space. You are an expert on how data products (like CDPs, data warehouses, and analytics tools) are implemented and adopted by customers.</li> <li>Is a proven cross-functional partner with a track record of successfully working with sales teams to navigate complex deals and drive revenue.</li> <li>Demonstrates expertise in communicating complex technical concepts clearly and effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</li> <li>Is skilled at prioritizing team activities and managing workload in a dynamic environment, balancing customer needs with efficiency goals.</li> <li>Is a natural mentor and developer of talent, with a passion for coaching and a history of building inclusive, high-achieving teams.</li> <li>Handles ambiguity with ease, demonstrating flexibility and a proactive, problem-solving mindset when adapting to new challenges and business priorities.</li> <li>Actively seeks feedback and is humble to learn, consistently looking for ways to improve themselves and their team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus Points</strong></p> <ul> <li>Previous experience in management consulting, strategic operations, or a similar role focused on go-to-market strategy.</li> <li>Direct, hands-on experience with Mixpanel or other product analytics tools like Amplitude, Pendo, or Contentsquare.</li> <li>Strong familiarity with the modern data stack, including tools like Snowflake, Google BigQuery, Segment, or Hightouch.</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p><span data-sheets-value="{&quot;1&quot;:2,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;The total target compensation (TTC) for this full-time position is $174,600 - $213,400 across the United States. This amount includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. This position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings here.\n\nOur salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.&quot;}" data-sheets-userformat="{&quot;2&quot;:769,&quot;3&quot;:{&quot;1&quot;:0},&quot;11&quot;:4,&quot;12&quot;:0}">The amount listed below is the total target cash compensation (TTCC) and includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. In addition to the cash compensation provided, this position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings <a href="https://mxpnl.notion.site/Check-out-our-benefits-869112a6cabe4c81a2b9da99de28f636" target="_blank">here</a>.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTCC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.</span></p></div><div class="title">Mixpanel Compensation Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$238,300</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$321,705 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Solutions Engineer
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><p><strong>About The Role:</strong></p> <p>You will help scale our potential by working with both our Sales and Partnerships teams.<br>As an SE, you will be collaborating with Account Executives as a trusted advisor to customers, working to tie Mixpanel’s solutions to their business needs. Our SEs need to be inquisitive, nimble, able to clearly articulate the technical benefits and requirements of Mixpanel to developers and product managers, and communicate the value of our product to high-level executives.<br>You’ll also be opening up a broad set of customers via Mixpanel’s partner ecosystem. More specifically, you will deliver seamless onboarding &amp; on-going enablement that educates Partners about the many facets of the Mixpanel solution including joint-value positioning, implementation, and product training. You will also collaborate with our Solution Engineering and Customer Success teams to share best practices and provide a best-in-class experience to our end customers via Partners.<br>In the first month, you will become a Mixpanel expert on both features and functionality, as well as implementation. You will be given the opportunity to shadow customer calls and demos with current Sales Engineers and Account Executives while learning how to articulate our value proposition. You will be trained on Mixpanel’s internal systems and tools in order to be set up for success.<br>Within the first three months, you will be directly involved in deal cycles with Account Executives and Partner Managers. You will be leading the technical qualification for customers’ use cases as well as delivering customized demos for prospects. You will work directly with leadership at our prospects and partners to understand business challenges that can be solved through an analytics platform and consult on how Mixpanel can solve those challenges.<strong><u><br><br></u>Responsibilities:<u><br></u></strong></p> <ul class="eea6ea04 _59213647"> <li>Partner with Account Executives to drive revenue growth by serving as the key technical contact for the customer</li> <ul class="eea6ea04 _59213647"> <li>Utilize your Mixpanel knowledge and technical and consultative skills to impart best practices throughout proof of concept projects.</li> <li>Partner with post-sales teams to ensure the articulated pre-sales value proposition translates into tangible post-sales value.</li> <li>Develop relationships and uncover the needs of key technical stakeholders within your assigned book of business.</li> </ul> <li>Set partners up for success on projects with mutual customers</li> <ul class="eea6ea04 _59213647"> <li>Work with Partnership Managers and Partner Success to develop an intimate understanding of the businesses and strategic objectives of each partner &amp; then align our Partner Programs to support those objectives through effective delivery of Partner onboarding and training curriculum</li> <li>Continuously evaluate existing Partners’ competencies/needs along with customer needs in order to surface areas for improvement or new opportunities for partners</li> <li>Effectively present resources for partners for repeatable services at scale: updates on positioning, differentiating our offering, best practices in demo’ing, measuring analytics ROI, and creating a services economy around Mixpanel</li> </ul> </ul> <p><strong>We're Looking For Someone Who Has:</strong></p> <ul class="eea6ea04 _59213647"> <li>3 to 5 years of experience in a client-facing professional services or sales engineering, or pre-sales role in a SAAS company</li> <li>Adept at managing complex projects with assorted stakeholders, working across teams and departments</li> <li>Understands analytics best practices and use cases across industries/verticals and can translate these strategies into tailored Partner onboarding &amp; training</li> <li>Desire and energy from making others successful - a “teach someone how to fish” mentality</li> <li>Has a passion for data and analytics, with the ability to apply creativity and curiosity to the problem-solving process. Bonus points for depth in user analytics/product analytics -- you will become a Mixpanel expert!</li> <li>Experience analyzing data to drive continuous improvement and prove the efficacy of programs</li> <li>Have experience working with customers and ecosystem partners in the APAC region</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus Points For:</strong></p> <ul class="eea6ea04 _59213647"> <li>Experience using Mixpanel</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: <p>Customer Success Manager (CAM) 는 온보딩, 상향 판매 및 교차 판매를 통해 기존 고객 기반 전반에 걸쳐 새로운 제품 애착을 적극적으로 유도하고 강력한 관계를 효과적으로 구축하게 됩니다. 내부적으로 고객을 옹호하고 긍정적인 고객 경험에 집중하게 됩니다. 상호작용은 무엇보다도 관계 관리에 뿌리를 두고 있으며, 성장 기회를 옹호하기도 합니다. 고객 성공 관리자는 잘 정의된 방법론을 따라 고객의 고유한 요구 사항을 파악하고 Datadog 제품의 가치를 명확하게 전달합니다.&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Datadog은 사무실 문화를 통해 구축되는 관계와 협업, 창의성을 중시합니다. 우리는 데이터독 직원들이 자신에게 가장 적합한 일과 삶의 조화를 이룰 수 있도록 하이브리드 업무 환경을 운영합니다.</em></p> <p><strong>담당 업무</strong></p> <ul> <li>영업팀과 협력하여 원활한 전환 및 온보딩 경험을 보장&nbsp;</li> <li>고객과의 관계를 적극적으로 구축하여 상호 신뢰 구축&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>기존 고객 계정의 성장 기회에 대한 전체 영업 주기를 성공적으로 수행&nbsp;</li> <li>고객이 데이터독 솔루션을 효과적으로 활용할 수 있도록 조언자 역할을 수행&nbsp;</li> <li>사용 추세를 모니터링하고 파악하여 갱신 위험을 발견하고 채택률을 높임</li> <li>내부 데이터도그 팀(지원, 제품, 재무, 법무) 간에 부서 간 협업&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>자격 요건</strong></p> <ul> <li>디테일에 대한 뛰어난 집중력을 갖춘 우수한 커뮤니케이터</li> <li>장기적이고 지속적인 관계 구축을 통해 동기 부여가 되는 분</li> <li>업무를 통해 가시적인 영향을 만들 수 있는 기회에 동기부여가 되는 분&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>고객 중심, 항상 최고의 가치를 제공하기 위해 노력하는 분</li> <li>끊임없이 진화하는 유동적인 솔루션 중심 환경에서 근무하실 수 있는 분</li> <li>업셀/크로스셀 활동을 위한 계약 조건을 독립적으로 협상하고 가격 이의제기를 극복한 경험</li> </ul> <p><em>Datadog은 모든 계층의 사람들을 소중히 여깁니다. 모든 사람이 입사 첫날에 위의 모든 자격 요건을 충족하지 못할 수도 있습니다. 괜찮습니다. 기술에 대한 열정이 있고 경험을 쌓고 싶다면 지원하실 것을 권장합니다.</em></p> <p><strong>혜택 및 성장:</strong></p> <ul> <li>최우수한 수준의 온보딩</li> <li>MEDDIC 및 Command of the Message 의 영업 교육&nbsp;</li> <li>포용적인 기업 문화, 커뮤니티 길드 가입 기회</li> <li>사내 네트워킹을 위한 부서 내 멘토 및 버디 프로그램&nbsp;</li> <li>지속적인 전문성 개발, 제품 교육 및 커리어 경로 제공&nbsp;</li> <li>신규 채용 우리사주(RSU) 및 직원 주식 매입 계획(ESPP)</li> <li>풍성한 글로벌 혜택</li> </ul> <p><em>위에 나열된 혜택 및 성장은 근무 국가 및 데이터독 고용의 성격에 따라 달라질 수 있습니다.</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. This form is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Privacy and AI Guidelines:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662">Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>. For information on our AI policy, please visit <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/interviewing-at-datadog-ai-guidelines/" target="_blank">Interviewing at Datadog AI Guidelines</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Strategic Account Executive
jobs.description: <p>Datadogのストラテジック・アカウント・エグゼクティブは、Datadogの事業戦略において重要な鍵を握る大手エンタープライズ・クライアントをターゲットに、新規顧客の開拓と長期的な利用拡大を担います。このポジションでは、大規模なクラウド環境での運用における困難や、クラウド環境への移行時にクライアントが直面する課題を明らかにし、最適なDatadogソリューションを提供できるよう注力します。</p> <p><em>Datadogでは、オフィスカルチャーによって築かれる人間関係やコラボレーション、そこからもたらされる創造性を大切にしています。私たちは、従業員それぞれに合ったワーク・ライフ・ハーモニーを実現できるよう、ハイブリッド・ワークプレイスとして運営しています。</em></p> <p><strong>業務内容：</strong></p> <ul> <li>効率的な営業プロセスを運用し、フォーチュン1000に名を連ねる大手企業を開拓する</li> <li>担当領域において、すでに関係性を有するコンタクトとこれから開拓したいコンタクトを含め、具体的なリレーションシップマップを構築し、責任を持って維持していく</li> <li>担当顧客のビジネスを深く理解する</li> <li>Datadogとのビジネスで得られる価値とROIを売り込むことによって、大手企業と有利な価格設定と取引条件を交渉する</li> <li>既存顧客の期待に応えつつ、担当領域を拡大させていく</li> <li>簡単には解決できない課題に直面したときには、臨機応変さを発揮する</li> <li>ビジネスを成立させ、担当顧客からの信頼と評価を得るために必要なステップを直感的に理解している</li> <li>すべてのビジネスチャンスの背景にあるビジネスドライバーを特定する</li> <li>フォーキャスティングにおける高い正確性と一貫性を保つ</li> </ul> <p><strong>募集要項：&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>中堅〜大手企業を担当したフィールドセールスとしてのクロージング経験が5年以上ある</li> <li>目標達成への高い意欲と、直販での平均10万ドル以上の取引額での営業と、100万ドル以上の売上目標の達成経験</li> <li>自ら見込顧客を開拓し、パイプラインを構築するためのメソッドを実行することができる</li> <li>革新的なテクノロジーを有する企業での勤務経験（SaaS、Cloud、インフラストラクチャーまたは類似の領域が望ましい）</li> <li>フォーチュン1000社に名を連ねる大手企業への営業経験があり、新規顧客（ロゴ）を獲得できる能力</li> </ul> <p><em>Datadogは、さまざまな立場の人々を大切にしています。誰もが初日から上記の資格をすべて満たすわけではないことは理解しています。それでも構いません。テクノロジーに情熱を持ち、スキルを伸ばしたいと思っている方は、ぜひご応募ください。</em></p> <p><strong>福利厚生と成長機会：&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>個々のパフォーマンスと成果に基づく豊かな報酬体系</li> <li>新入社員への株式付与（RSU / 譲渡制限付株式ユニット）および従業員株式購入制度（ESPP）</li> <li>プレジデント・クラブへの参加機会</li> <li>継続的な専門能力開発、製品トレーニング、キャリアパスの提供&nbsp;</li> <li>MEDDICとCommand of Messageに関する丁寧な営業研修&nbsp;</li> <li>社内ネットワーク構築のためのメンターおよびバディ・プログラム&nbsp;</li> <li>インクルーシブな企業文化、コミュニティ・ギルドへの参加機会</li> <li>幅広く手厚い医療関連の福利厚生制度</li> <li>企業型確定拠出年金（401K）</li> <li>ペットの養子縁組と保険プログラム</li> </ul> <p><em>上記の内容は、就業する国やDatadogでの雇用内容によって異なる場合があります。</em></p> <p><em>世界中のすべての候補者様にご理解頂けるよう、応募情報に関する項目は一部、英語のままで記載されています。全ての求人情報を英語でご確認されたい場合は、<a href="https://careers.datadoghq.com/detail/5496357/?gh_jid=5496357">こちら</a>をご覧ください。</em></p> <p style="color: white;">##LI-KO1</p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. This form is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Privacy and AI Guidelines:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662">Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>. For information on our AI policy, please visit <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/interviewing-at-datadog-ai-guidelines/" target="_blank">Interviewing at Datadog AI Guidelines</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Strategic Account Executive, Public Sector Japan, FED
jobs.description: <p>DatadogのFederalセールスチームは、顧客が直面する実際の課題を解決するベスト・イン・クラスのプロダクトを提供しています。セールス担当者は、顧客固有のニーズを的確に見極め、Datadogの価値を明確に伝えるための体系化されたセールスメソドロジーに基づいて活動します。トップセールスから学びたい方、あるいはトップセールスとして活躍したい方にとって、Datadogのセールスチームは個人の成長とチームの成功を本気で支援する環境です。</p> <p>私たちは、テクノロジーに対する強い情熱を持ち、チャレンジングな売上目標を達成できる経験豊富なFederal（中央省庁）セールスエグゼクティブを募集しています。Datadogがより大きな市場へ進出し、Public Sector（公共分野）エンタープライズセグメントへの支援を本格化する中で、このチームは組織成長を牽引する重要な役割を担います。本ポジションは、将来性の高いテリトリーにおいて新たな中央省庁・政府機関を開拓すると同時に、ハイブリッド環境からクラウドへ移行中の顧客とも関われる、非常に魅力的な機会です。</p> <p><em>Datadogでは、オフィスカルチャーによって築かれる人間関係やコラボレーション、そこからもたらされる創造性を大切にしています。私たちは、従業員それぞれに合ったワーク・ライフ・ハーモニー（ワークライフバランス）を実現できるよう、ハイブリッド・ワークプレイス（ハイブリットな職場環境）として運営しています。</em></p> <p><strong>業務内容：</strong></p> <ul> <li>中央省庁、政府機関に対するプロスペクティングおよび、効率的なセールスプロセスの遂行</li> <li>担当テリトリーにおける関係者マップの構築・管理（既存関係者および将来的なキーパーソン含む）</li> <li>顧客ビジネスに対する深い理解の構築</li> <li>価値とROIを軸にした、大手企業との価格・契約条件の交渉</li> <li>既存顧客の期待値を適切にマネジメントしつつ、担当テリトリー内での関係拡張・深耕</li> <li>解決が容易でない課題に直面した際の高い問題解決力の発揮</li> <li>クロージングに必要なステップを直感的に把握し、顧客の合意を獲得</li> <li>すべての商談における主要なビジネスドライバーの特定</li> <li>高い精度と一貫性を持ったフォーキャスト管理</li> </ul> <p><strong>募集要項：</strong></p> <ul> <li>5年以上のクロージング経験をお持ちの方（ミッドマーケットおよびエンタープライズでのフィールドセールス経験を含む）</li> <li>年間100万ドル以上の売上目標を達成または超過した実績があり、平均ディールサイズ10万ドル以上の取引経験</li> <li>自らプロスペクティングし、パイプラインを構築できる明確なセールスメソドロジーをお持ちの方</li> <li>SaaS、ITインフラ等の革新的なテック企業での勤務経験（尚可）</li> <li>Fortune 1000規模の大企業に対する新規ロゴ獲得の実績</li> </ul> <p><em>Datadogは、さまざまな立場の人々を大切にしています。誰もが初日から上記の資格をすべて満たすわけではないことは理解しています。それでも構いません。テクノロジーに情熱を持ち、スキルを伸ばしたいと思っている方は、ぜひご応募ください。</em></p> <p><strong>福利厚生と成長機会：&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>個々のパフォーマンスと成果に基づく豊かな報酬体系</li> <li>新入社員への株式付与（RSU / 譲渡制限付株式ユニット）および従業員株式購入制度（ESPP）</li> <li>プレジデント・クラブへの参加機会</li> <li>継続的な専門能力開発、製品トレーニング、キャリアパスの提供&nbsp;</li> <li>MEDDICとCommand of Messageに関する丁寧な営業研修&nbsp;</li> <li>社内ネットワーク構築のためのメンターおよびバディ・プログラム&nbsp;</li> <li>インクルーシブな企業文化、コミュニティ・ギルドへの参加機会</li> <li>幅広く手厚い医療関連の福利厚生制度</li> <li>企業型確定拠出年金（401K）</li> <li>ペットの養子縁組と保険プログラム</li> </ul> <p><em>上記の福利厚生と成長は、雇用国やDatadogでの雇用内容によって異なる場合があります。</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another.
