Our cloud-native platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi-cloud database and is available across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.</p> <p>With offices worldwide and nearly 60,000 customers—including 75% of the Fortune 100 and AI-native startups—relying on MongoDB for their most important applications, we’re powering the next era of software.</p> <p>Our compass at MongoDB is our <a href="https://www.mongodb.com/company">Leadership Commitment,</a> guiding how and why we make decisions, show up for each other, and win. It’s what makes us MongoDB.&nbsp;</p> <p>To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. <a href="https://www.mongodb.com/company/blog/culture/employee-benefits-that-make-a-difference-at-mongodb">From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy</a>, we value our employees’ wellbeing and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys.<a href="https://www.mongodb.com/blog/channel/culture"> Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB</a>, and help us make an impact on the world!</p> <p>MongoDB is committed to providing any necessary accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.</p> <p>MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer.</p> <p>Req ID - 425335</p>

jobs.title: Account Executive, Mid Market
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>Our Sales team manages the full sales cycle, helping prospects and existing customers leverage Mixpanel to analyze, measure, and improve their customer experience. The Account Executive has two main responsibilities: to bring in new business and to nurture existing customers. The team specifically covers companies with employee sizes from 250 to 1000, with an emphasis on high-growth tech companies that are changing the world around us.</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>As an Account Executive, you'll help our future customers understand the power of Mixpanel as the best-in-class product analytics solution in the market. Collaboration is key, from building strong relationships with prospects and key stakeholders to working with internal cross-functional partners like Solutions Engineering to win together as one team. You'll leverage your prospecting skills selling SaaS to tech companies alongside strong knowledge of Mixpanel's product and ecosystem to close new business, powering the next generation of innovative companies.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Prospect into new business units of your targeted customer accounts — build and maintain a pipeline while owning the sales cycle from start to finish.</li> <li>Drive awareness of Mixpanel as a solution within the marketplace and handle inbound requests from interested prospects.</li> <li>Maintains accurate Salesforce records related to New Business opportunities, and delivers accurate weekly forecasts related to revenue targets.</li> <li>Approach all deals with a customer-focused mentality. Develop relationships and uncover the needs of multiple key stakeholders to find value moments.</li> <li>Sell with a long-term consultative approach.</li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with key partners such as Solutions Engineering, Customer Success, Product, Marketing, and Legal.</li> <li>Intimately understand Mixpanel's competition as well as technology partners to consult customers on our place in the broader analytics market.</li> </ul> <p><strong>We're Looking For Someone Who Has</strong></p> <ul> <li>At least 3-5 years of experience in full-cycle SaaS Sales from prospect to close, as an Account Executive.</li> <li>Strong outbound prospecting experience and have had success at closing net new business deals.</li> <li>Experience running a consultative sales process for complex, multi-product SaaS solutions — comfortable navigating multiple stakeholders and driving strategic conversations beyond a single use case.</li> <li>Effective communicator and collaborator — you have strong interpersonal skills and are an excellent team player.</li> <li>Adaptability — you understand that change is constant, and you embrace it.</li> <li>Agility and resilience — you move quickly and encourage continued improvement.</li> <li>Strong work ethic, desire to learn, and a drive to excel.</li> <li>Curious about the product analytics space.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus Points For</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience selling into high-growth tech companies.</li> <li>Experience with Mixpanel or other analytics tools.</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p><span data-sheets-value="{&quot;1&quot;:2,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;The total target compensation (TTC) for this full-time position is $174,600 - $213,400 across the United States. This amount includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. This position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings here.\n\nOur salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.&quot;}" data-sheets-userformat="{&quot;2&quot;:769,&quot;3&quot;:{&quot;1&quot;:0},&quot;11&quot;:4,&quot;12&quot;:0}">The amount listed below is the total target cash compensation (TTCC) and includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. In addition to the cash compensation provided, this position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings <a href="https://mxpnl.notion.site/Check-out-our-benefits-869112a6cabe4c81a2b9da99de28f636" target="_blank">here</a>.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTCC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.</span></p></div><div class="title">Mixpanel Compensation Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$207,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$253,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Marketing Manager, Autonomous Rides
jobs.description: <p>At Lyft, our purpose is to serve and connect. We aim to achieve this by cultivating a work environment where all team members belong and have the opportunity to thrive.</p> <p>Since 2012, we’ve transformed how people get around. Now, Lyft’s <strong>Global Growth</strong> team is creating the world’s leading hybrid rideshare network with autonomous vehicles (AVs). To help us achieve these goals, we are looking for an experienced <strong>Marketing Manager</strong> to help shape the future of autonomous rides.&nbsp;</p> <p>It’s an exciting time to be part of the team. We’re not just reimagining the future of rideshare - we’re actively building it. As the <strong>AV Marketing Manager</strong>, you’ll embed deeply with our product, business development, operations, and marketplace teams to understand our roadmap then coordinate cross-functionally to drive cohesive launches that both build trust with customers - and position Lyft to win the AV transformation.</p> <p>The ideal candidate will have strong business acumen and a background in marketing, including a track record of developing impactful marketing strategies and a proven ability to build key cross-functional relationships. Experience in partnerships, the travel and hospitality space, autonomous vehicles, or with a marketplace business is a plus.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Shape marketing strategy and high-impact go-to-market launches for AV partner launches</li> <li>Partner with regional marketing leads (North America/Europe) to execute in market</li> <li>Be the voice of the customer to influence cross-functional thinking; continually inform the product roadmap &amp; marketing plans to meet customer needs</li> <li>Build a broad understanding of existing research and competitive landscape, identify gaps, and surface actionable insights that can inform product and marketing strategy</li> <li>Partner with cross-functional teams such as Product, User Research, Operations, Partnerships, to ensure our marketing approach delivers against business objectives</li> <li>Write inspiring creative briefs and shepherd the creative development process</li> <li>Partner across Comms, Social Media, and Marketing teams to advance our AV narrative across touchpoints</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Experience:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>3-5 years of experience in product marketing, or similar area</li> <li>Experience in applying consumer insights to inform and optimize product roadmaps and marketing efforts</li> <li>Experience developing strategies to solve ambiguous and complex problems</li> <li>Strong project management skills with experience coordinating complex, multi-stakeholder launches</li> <li>Very strong written communication skills; ability to effectively tailor communication to a variety of audiences</li> <li>Thrives in fast-paced environments and can adapt quickly to shifting priorities. Must have bias toward action and ability to identify and simplify problems</li> <li>Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate, manage expectations and work cross-functionally with both analytical and creative teams</li> <li>Analytical thinker with experience in data-driven marketing; ability to independently drive experimentation focused on conversion and engagement</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Benefits:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Extended health and dental coverage options, along with life insurance and disability benefits</li> <li>Mental health benefits</li> <li>Family building benefits</li> <li>Child care and pet benefits</li> <li>Access to a Lyft funded Health Care Savings Account</li> <li>RRSP plan with company match to help save for your future</li> <li>In addition to provincial observed holidays, salaried team members are covered under Lyft's flexible paid time off policy. The policy allows team members to take off as much time as they need (with manager approval). Hourly team members get 15 days paid time off, with an additional day for each year of service&nbsp;</li> <li>Lyft is proud to support new parents with 18 weeks of paid time off, designed as a top-up plan to complement provincial programs. Biological, adoptive, and foster parents are all eligible.</li> <li>Subsidized commuter benefits and Lyft ride credits</li> </ul> <p>Lyft is committed to creating an inclusive workforce that fosters belonging. Lyft believes that every person has a right to equal employment opportunities without discrimination because of race, ancestry, place of origin, colour, ethnic origin, citizenship, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, family status, disability, pardoned record of offences, or any other basis protected by applicable law or by Company policy. Lyft also strives for a healthy and safe workplace and strictly prohibits harassment of any kind.&nbsp; Accommodation for persons with disabilities will be provided upon request in accordance with applicable law during the application and hiring process. Please contact your recruiter if you wish to make such a request.</p> <p>Lyft highly values having employees working in-office to foster a collaborative work environment and company culture. This role will be in-office on a hybrid schedule — Team Members will be expected to work in the office at least 3 days per week, including on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays. Lyft considers working in the office at least 3 days per week to be an essential function of this hybrid role. Your recruiter can share more information about the various in-office perks Lyft offers. Additionally, hybrid roles have the flexibility to work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per year. #Hybrid</p> <p>The expected base pay range for this position in the Toronto area is CAD $90,000 - CAD 112,500, not inclusive of potential equity offering, bonus or benefits. Salary ranges are dependent on a variety of factors, including qualifications, experience and geographic location. Your recruiter can share more information about the salary range specific to your working location and other factors during the hiring process.</p> <p>Lyft may use artificial intelligence to screen applicants, however, Lyft employees make the ultimate selection and hiring decisions.</p> <p>This job fills an existing vacancy.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p>

jobs.title: Product Manager, Driver Experience
jobs.description: <p>At Lyft, our purpose is to serve and connect. We aim to achieve this by cultivating a work environment where all team members belong and have the opportunity to thrive.</p> <p>Lyft connects people to transportation to change the way we live and get around our communities. We are looking for Product Managers who bring exceptional creative, strategic, and analytical skills to drive forward a best in class product. Product Management at Lyft leads the integration of engineering, data science, and design to achieve the company’s purpose to serve and connect. We are looking for entrepreneurial and passionate Product Managers to innovate and execute across a rapidly growing, fast-paced company and industry.</p> <p>The Driver team is dedicated to fostering a platform of high-quality service by empowering drivers to perform their best. We are looking for a strategic product manager to join our dynamic and fast-paced team. In this role, you will identify and solve pain points that matter most to drivers by streamlining key interactions, reducing friction, and creating systems that feel intuitive, fair, and supportive. The ideal candidate brings high empathy, a strong analytical mindset, and a collaborative spirit, with the ability to work effectively across Lyft to deliver experiences that reflect our commitment to quality, transparency, and fairness.</p> <h2><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Deeply understand driver and business needs to set an ambitious product vision that motivates and inspires your team, peers and leadership</li> <li>Set your team's goals and success metrics that align with Lyft's mission and drive maximum impact based on data analysis, market research and user research</li> <li>Build a product roadmap to achieve your goals and lead a core team of engineers, designers, data scientists, and marketers to execute on it.</li> <li>Build alignment and collaborate with partner teams on shared goals and initiatives</li> <li>Communicate roadmaps, priorities, experiments and decisions across a broad set of audiences from partner teams to executive levels</li> <li>Completely own your team's products, existing or new, from ideation, through development, to launch, growth and maintenance</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Experience:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>3+ years in product management, product design or equivalent consultant experience with significant time spent leading consumer facing products&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Ability to make things happen</strong>: You manage project ambiguity, complexity, and interdependencies in an organized and structured way, and you are able to define and analyze metrics that inform the success of your products</li> <li><strong>Customer obsessed</strong>: Strong user empathy and experience in the customer discovery and product development process&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Strong decision making</strong>: Experience building alignment and influencing decision making across org lines and with senior leadership; specifically showcasing strong judgment when balancing a flawless user experience and the needs of a two sided marketplace&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Strong communication</strong>: Skills and intuition for communication strategy at every level -- within teams, within the company, to users, and other audiences</li> <li><strong>Detail oriented</strong>: Balancing multiple projects, deadlines, and requests should be second nature to you</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Benefits:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Extended health and dental coverage options, along with life insurance and disability benefits</li> <li>Mental health benefits</li> <li>Family building benefits</li> <li>Child care and pet benefits</li> <li>Access to a Lyft funded Health Care Savings Account</li> <li>RRSP plan with company match to help save for your future</li> <li>In addition to provincial observed holidays, salaried team members are covered under Lyft's flexible paid time off policy. The policy allows team members to take off as much time as they need (with manager approval). Hourly team members get 15 days paid time off, with an additional day for each year of service&nbsp;</li> <li>Lyft is proud to support new parents with 18 weeks of paid time off, designed as a top-up plan to complement provincial programs. Biological, adoptive, and foster parents are all eligible.</li> <li>Subsidized commuter benefits and Lyft ride credits</li> </ul> <p><em>Lyft is committed to creating an inclusive workforce that fosters belonging. Lyft believes that every person has a right to equal employment opportunities without discrimination because of race, ancestry, place of origin, colour, ethnic origin, citizenship, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, family status, disability, pardoned record of offences, or any other basis protected by applicable law or by Company policy. Lyft also strives for a healthy and safe workplace and strictly prohibits harassment of any kind.&nbsp; Accommodation for persons with disabilities will be provided upon request in accordance with applicable law during the application and hiring process. Please contact your recruiter if you wish to make such a request.</em></p> <p><em>Lyft highly values having employees working in-office to foster a collaborative work environment and company culture. </em><em>This role will be in-office on a hybrid schedule — Team Members will be expected to work in the office at least 3 days per week, including on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays. </em><em>Lyft considers working in the office at least 3 days per week to be an essential function of this hybrid role. Your recruiter can share more information about the various in-office perks Lyft offers. </em><em>Additionally, hybrid roles have the flexibility to work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per year. </em><em>#Hybrid</em></p> <p><em>The expected base pay range for this position in the Toronto area is $108,000-135,000 CAD, not inclusive of potential equity offering, bonus or benefits. Salary ranges are dependent on a variety of factors, including qualifications, experience and geographic location. Your recruiter can share more information about the salary range specific to your working location and other factors during the hiring process.</em></p> <p><em>Lyft may use artificial intelligence to screen applicants, however, Lyft employees make the ultimate selection and hiring decisions.</em></p> <p><em>This job fills an existing vacancy.</em></p>

jobs.title: Implementation Consultant, Embedded Finance
jobs.location: New York, New York, United States
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Implementation at Brex</strong></p> <p>Implementation transforms new customers into power users. We lead the onboarding experience for companies adopting Brex Empower, helping them shift from outdated processes to a modern, employee-first approach. It’s a role that blends customer empathy, project management, technical expertise, process design, and change management. We take personal ownership of our customers' long-term success, and we set customers up thoroughly so they can be with ‘Brex for life’. As strategic advisors, we build trust, drive solutions with tenacity, deliver results fast, and work cross-functionally to make adoption seamless for customers.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>Embedded is Brex's most strategically important growth frontier and this role sits at the epicenter. You'll sit on the Implementation Team and will wire together partner ecosystems across Business Development and Product, configure complex integrations, and deliver customer experiences that genuinely delight. You won't be following a playbook, you’ll be writing it. This role focuses on ensuring successful onboarding and configuration of embedded services such as Navan, Zip, Coupa Cards, and ICCP partnerships.</p> <p><strong>Where you’ll work</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in our New York City office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require a minimum of three coordinated days in the office per week, Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead implementation work streams for embedded services across all customer segments</li> <li>Own end-to-end implementation for embedded-only customer projects (27 Navan, 46 Zip forecasted H2 deals). Partner with the BD team on net-new embedded partnership launches helping define how Brex integrates with the next generation of platforms.</li> <li>Configure embedded services in coordination with partner tech specs and Brex.</li> <li>Provide consultative guidance to customers to ensure embedded tools are correctly deployed.</li> <li>Maintain deep knowledge of embedded product evolution and serve as the internal authority, educating CSMs, VIP Support, and cross-functional teams.</li> <li>Success is measured by on-time and high-quality delivery for forecasted embedded deals, reduced escalations or partner configuration issues, and positive feedback from partner and cross-functional stakeholders.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience: 2+ years in SaaS implementation, integration, or technical consulting you've navigated complex deployments and have the wins to show for it.</li> <li>Domain Knowledge: Familiarity with embedded finance or third-party SaaS integrations you understand how these ecosystems fit together and where friction hides.</li> <li>Communication: A natural communicator who can translate technical complexity into clear, confident guidance for Brex customers, partners, and internal stakeholders.</li> <li>Execution: Highly organized and comfortable managing multiple concurrent projects in a fast-moving environment where no two implementations look the same.</li> <li>Mindset: Energized by ambiguity. You thrive when the product is evolving and the partnership landscape is expanding.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p>The expected salary range for this role is $119,328 - $149,160 USD.&nbsp; However, the starting base pay will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.</p> <p>Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One, N.A.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Outbound Sales Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Sales at Brex</strong></p> <p>Sales is the growth engine at Brex. We bring in new customers, expand existing relationships, and drive the company’s bottom line. With unlimited territories and uncapped opportunity, your ambition sets the ceiling. We win together, celebrate often, and reward performance. If you want to sell a category-defining product with real ownership, this is your team.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">As a Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for prospecting and identifying new customers for Brex. You will partner with Account Executives to help businesses understand the value of Brex as a financial services solution and the rewards that it provides fast growing companies. We’re rapidly growing our team which requires a “whatever it takes” attitude, a high sense of urgency, and a passion for sales. As an SDR at Brex, you will have the opportunity to help create processes and build pipelines for $1 million deals immediately.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>Where you’ll work</strong><br><br>This role will be based in our Seattle office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require three days per week in office - Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!<br></span></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Identify growing companies that would gain value from Brex&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Prospect companies that are growing and spending; educate them on our modern corporate card and spend management software</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Navigate through a conversation flow to uncover business needs, understand pains, and position Brex as a compelling solution</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Maintain and update an accurate log of activity in the CRM system</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Hit daily KPIs across a variety of touch points: email, phone, social</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Use email to correspond with leads to follow up and/or to confirm appointments</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Provide feedback to others in department related to information prospects share that could be helpful in advertising/marketing as well as our overall programs</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Experience in a general sales role OR a related field in hospitality, customer service, etc.</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">The ability to proactively engage new clients through email and phone</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">A high sense of urgency coupled with an ability to adapt and pivot in every conversation</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Strong communication skills to passionately and clearly articulate the value of Brex</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Work with Marketing Operations to define, execute, and optimize prospecting approaches through A/B tests</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">A team-player attitude with a desire to improve internal processes beyond your day-to-day tasks</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">A desire to learn, grow, and launch your career at a cutting-edge financial technology company&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">SaaS or B2B experience&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Experience with Salesforce, Outreach, and/or ZoomInfo</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Demonstrated ability to exceed impact &amp; activity quotas&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p>The expected OTE range for this role is $82,535 - $92,852 USD. The starting wage will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. This OTE range reflects a standard work week, however, as an hourly employee if you exceed these hours, you will be paid overtime. The OTE figure listed here includes base compensation and commissions, which may or may not be earned depending on performance.&nbsp; Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation.</p> <div id="te-floating-button-container"></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Account Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>The Account Development Representative (ADR) job is the launching point for someone looking for a successful career in Software as a Services sales. In this role, you will be at the front of Samsara’s go-to-market strategy. This includes searching for leads, mapping enterprise accounts, and building demand for Samsara’s full line of products. This role is ideal for individuals looking to develop enterprise technology sales skills and to advance their careers. Successful ADRs earn accelerated commissions and head down the path for promotion into closing roles. You will work closely with top-tier executives and will see up close how sales organizations succeed.</p> <p><strong>This is a hybrid position based in our Atlanta office requiring 3 days per week onsite and 2 days working remotely.</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world: </strong>Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career: </strong>If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. Successful ADRs can see promotion to a closing role in two years or less.</li> <li><strong>You love talking to people: </strong>In this role, you will average 80+ calls to prospective customers daily.</li> <li><strong>You have an innate curiosity about how businesses work: </strong>One day you’ll meet with someone in waste management and the next you may be learning about the inner workings of a food distribution center. Our top sales team members seek to learn the ins and outs of the businesses they support in order to make a larger impact.</li> <li><strong>You treat rejection as a learning experience:</strong> In this role, you will get hung up on and you will get told no. You need to have the resilience to pick up the phone again and again to sell Samsara’s mission.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>Samsara’s high-performance Sales culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Learn about the sales funnel and observe the full sales cycle - from generating a lead to closing a deal.</li> <li>Manage inbound lead flow, qualify leads, and distribute them to appropriate sales representatives.</li> <li>Execute outbound campaigns to engage potential customers and generate new leads.</li> <li>Identify and map organizational structures to pinpoint key decision-makers within prospective accounts.</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop product-focused marketing campaigns that support sales objectives.</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Willingness to conduct 80+ cold calls a day</li> <li>Willingness to travel to the Atlanta, GA or Phoenix, AZ city centers</li> <li>Must be currently enrolled in an accredited 4-year Bachelor's degree program or within 1 year of graduation</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>High level of interest in the IoT space</li> <li>Excitement around growing a sales career</li> <li>Comfortability in a dynamic, customer-facing environment</li> <li>Previous cold-calling experience</li> <li>Motivation to be in a goal-oriented, quota-carrying role</li> <li>Excellent interpersonal skills</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Annual on-target earnings (OTE) range for full-time employees for this position is below and depends on your city of residence. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual OTE Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$73,440</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$73,440 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

You need to have the resilience to pick up the phone again and again to sell Samsara’s mission.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>Samsara’s high-performance Sales culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Learn about the sales funnel and observe the full sales cycle - from generating a lead to closing a deal.</li> <li>Manage inbound lead flow, qualify leads, and distribute them to appropriate sales representatives.</li> <li>Execute outbound campaigns to engage potential customers and generate new leads.</li> <li>Identify and map organizational structures to pinpoint key decision-makers within prospective accounts.</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop product-focused marketing campaigns that support sales objectives.</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Willingness to conduct 80+ cold calls a day</li> <li>Willingness to travel to the Atlanta, GA or Phoenix, AZ city centers</li> <li>Must be currently enrolled in an accredited 4-year Bachelor's degree program or within 1 year of graduation</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>High level of interest in the IoT space</li> <li>Excitement around growing a sales career</li> <li>Comfortability in a dynamic, customer-facing environment</li> <li>Previous cold-calling experience</li> <li>Motivation to be in a goal-oriented, quota-carrying role</li> <li>Excellent interpersonal skills</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Annual on-target earnings (OTE) range for full-time employees for this position is below and depends on your city of residence. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual OTE Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$73,440</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$73,440 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. Typical sales will be $20k to $100k, and involve POCs, multiple stakeholders, managing trials, multi-faceted pricing negotiations, and selling to executives and CXOs.&nbsp;</p> <div id="1734455445.916749" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1734455445.916749"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong>This role is open for candidates residing in the following US states: West Virginia,&nbsp;Virginia,&nbsp;Kentucky,&nbsp;Tennessee,&nbsp;North Carolina,&nbsp;South Carolina,&nbsp;Georgia,&nbsp;Florida&nbsp;. <strong data-stringify-type="bold">The role requires travel approximately 25% of the time.</strong></strong></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <p><strong>You should apply if:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world: </strong>Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>Your mantra is #alwaysbeprospecting:</strong> The world of operations is vast. Your customers are often out in the field and the best way to catch them is live on the phone. Samsara’s top reps do constant research to find companies and contacts to expand their pipeline.</li> <li><strong>You have innate curiosity in how businesses work:</strong> One day you’ll meet with someone in waste management and the next you may be learning about the inner workings of a food distribution center. Our top sales team members seek to learn the ins and outs of the businesses they support in order to make a larger impact.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You are a life-long learner: </strong>Samsara sales are complex. You will need to learn about businesses where you previously had little knowledge. The payoff is big but you have to be willing to put in the work.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You build genuine relationships with your customers: </strong>The industries we serve have relied on pen-and-paper solutions for years and haven’t been met with the type of technology we offer. Our customers value earned trust and human relationships built over time.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>Samsara’s high-performance Sales culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for this role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years experience in a full-cycle, closing sales role</li> <li>Experience independently closing new deals larger than $10,000 in annual revenue</li> <li> <div id="1694545918.572739" class="c-virtual_list__item c-virtual_list__item--initial-activeitem" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1694545918.572739"> <div class="c-message_kit__background c-message_kit__background--hovered p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover c-message_kit__hover--hovered" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section">All candidates must be located in one of the following states: West Virginia, Virginia, Kentucky, Tennessee, North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, Florida.</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Proven track record of consistent quota achievement</li> <li>Experience selling in the midmarket space - medium to large deals sizes</li> <li>Experience with high-volume cold calling</li> <li>Must demonstrate a growth mindset and a willingness to be collaborative with your teammates and in your selling process</li> <li>SFDC familiarity</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Annual on-target earnings (OTE) range for full-time employees for this position is below and depends on your city of residence. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual OTE Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$152,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$190,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive - Public Sector
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>This is a dynamic, high energy role in which you will bring the Internet of Things to mid-sized customers, building Samsara's business and bringing the benefits of sensor data to customers. Typical sales will be $20k to $250k, and typically involve POCs, multiple stakeholders, multi-faceted pricing negotiations, and selling to executives and CXOs.</p> <p>This role will be fully remote, based anywhere in the United States.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You should apply if:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world: </strong>Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>You have innate curiosity in how businesses work: </strong>One day you’ll meet with someone in waste management and the next you may be learning about the inner workings of a food distribution center. Our top sales team members seek to learn the ins and outs of the businesses they support in order to make a larger impact.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You build genuine relationships with your customers:</strong> The industries we serve have relied on pen-and-paper solutions for years and haven’t been met with the type of technology we offer. Our customers value earned trust and human relationships built over time.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best:</strong> Samsara’s high-performance culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You are a team player:</strong> At Samsara, sales is a team sport. We help each other out by sharing best practices and focus on winning as a team.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><a href="https://www.samsara.com/blog/what-we-value-at-samsara/"><em>Click here</em></a><em> to learn about what we value at Samsara.&nbsp;</em></p> <p>&nbsp;<strong>In this role you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop Executive-Level relationships within your territory</li> <li>Own customer engagements end-to-end, from prospecting and qualification to close</li> <li>Demonstrate excellent solution-based sales process in complex sales campaigns</li> <li>Strategically outbound prospect</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Minimum of 2+ years experience in a full-cycle, closing sales role</li> <li>Experience selling full-cycle sales into complex environments (<em>preferably within Public Sector - Local Gov, K-12, High Education</em>)</li> <li>Must have a strong track record of overachievement to quota</li> <li>Cold calling, generating outreach, building relationships excites you</li> <li>Solid understanding of SFDC and accurate forecasting methodology</li> <li>Must be able to travel up to twice per quarter for onsites</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Awards for top achievement (President’s club, Winner’s circle, Top 10%)</li> <li>Experience public speaking in front of executive level personas</li> <li>Passion in closing large, complex deals</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Annual on-target earnings (OTE) range for full-time employees for this position is below and depends on your city of residence. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual OTE Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$152,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$190,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

We help each other out by sharing best practices and focus on winning as a team.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><a href="https://www.samsara.com/blog/what-we-value-at-samsara/"><em>Click here</em></a><em> to learn about what we value at Samsara.&nbsp;</em></p> <p>&nbsp;<strong>In this role you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop Executive-Level relationships within your territory</li> <li>Own customer engagements end-to-end, from prospecting and qualification to close</li> <li>Demonstrate excellent solution-based sales process in complex sales campaigns</li> <li>Strategically outbound prospect</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Minimum of 2+ years experience in a full-cycle, closing sales role</li> <li>Experience selling full-cycle sales into complex environments (<em>preferably within Public Sector - Local Gov, K-12, High Education</em>)</li> <li>Must have a strong track record of overachievement to quota</li> <li>Cold calling, generating outreach, building relationships excites you</li> <li>Solid understanding of SFDC and accurate forecasting methodology</li> <li>Must be able to travel up to twice per quarter for onsites</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Awards for top achievement (President’s club, Winner’s circle, Top 10%)</li> <li>Experience public speaking in front of executive level personas</li> <li>Passion in closing large, complex deals</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Annual on-target earnings (OTE) range for full-time employees for this position is below and depends on your city of residence. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual OTE Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$152,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$190,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>This is a dynamic, high energy role in which you will bring the Internet of Things to mid-sized customers, building Samsara's business and bringing the benefits of sensor data to customers.
