jobs.title: Marketing Content Operations Associate
jobs.description: <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>As Stripe’s user base and global footprint grows dramatically, we have distinctly unique support problems resulting from both our type of scale and the type of businesses we partner with. The Stripe Delivery Center (SDC) will provide operational leverage and expand Stripe’s portfolio of operational capabilities to support the scaled needs for external users and internal Stripe teams.</p> <p>This role will be part of the Marketing Services team in the SDC that is accountable for the delivery of all aspects of email demand and lead generation activities, lead nurturing, and conversion programs.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>We are looking for someone who is passionate about Marketing Content Operations and thrives in dynamic, complex environments. You are naturally curious, collaborative and comfortable operating in ambiguity and finding creative solutions.&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Manage the Highspot platform by creating and maintaining net-new pages for Product Marketing Managers (PMMs).</li> <li>Update the design and content of PMM-owned pages based on requests or identified improvement opportunities.</li> <li>Monitor content expiration dates; collaborate with content owners to confirm if material should be removed or renewed, and archive outdated content.</li> <li>Ensure that no content appears as expired on the platform to maintain accuracy and compliance.</li> <li>Develop comprehensive Highspot reports for stakeholders that detail content usage metrics (top and bottom performing), content age (new and old), top viewers, and other pertinent statistics.</li> <li>Provide monthly analytics reports to stakeholders and identify areas for improvement in content strategies and reporting processes.</li> <li>Gather feedback from sales teams on content effectiveness through Google Forms surveys to assess how viewed content meets their needs.</li> <li>Establish and implement an intake process for managing content, transitioning responsibilities currently handled by the contractor.</li> <li>Oversee project-based and ad-hoc work, focusing on weekly reporting and monitoring content aging to optimize content lifecycle management.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Qualifications:<br></strong></h3> <ul> <li data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Marketing or Sales Enablement background</li> <li>3+ year experience managing content in a CMS or sales enablement platform (e.g., Highspot, Seismic, Showpad, SharePoint, Webflow, Contentful)</li> <li>Strong content governance mindset: ownership of accuracy, freshness, standards, and lifecycle</li> <li>Experience defining and enforcing content standards and best practices</li> <li>High attention to detail when making updates across multiple related pages</li> <li>Ability to QA content for correctness and alignment with source-of-truth materials</li> <li>Ability to partner cross functionally with global marketing teams</li> <li>Clear written communication when documenting changes or decisions</li> </ul>

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Associate (Automation)
jobs.description: <p><strong>About Stripe</strong></p> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <p><strong>About the team</strong></p> <p>As Stripe’s user base and global footprint grows dramatically, we have distinctly unique support problems resulting from both our type of scale and the type of businesses we partner with. The Stripe Delivery Center (SDC) strategy will provide operational leverage and expand Stripe’s portfolio of operational capabilities to support the scaled needs for external users and internal Stripe teams.<br><br></p> <p>This role will be part of the Marketing Operations in SDC that is accountable for the production and delivery of all aspects of email demand and lead generation activities, lead nurturing, and conversion programs.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>We are looking for someone who is passionate about Marketing Automation and is naturally curious, and is comfortable operating in ambiguity and finding creative solutions. You will be responsible for the delivery of repeatable, measurable programs/campaigns that focus on highly qualified leads, improve the customer experience, and increase retention.<br><br></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build, test and launch complex email and nurture campaigns in Marketo</li> <li>Perform test runs and quality control with strong attention to detail</li> <li>Conduct advanced A/B testing on email and landing page assets and, suggest testing opportunities</li> <li>Identify gaps in our marketing automation infrastructure and work cross functionally to address them (ex. Program structure inefficiencies, process flaws, etc)</li> <li>Scope, manage and deliver email campaigns from intake to execution</li> <li>Create Marketo programs to support email sends, landing pages, and form processing</li> <li>Maintain a library of core assets such as images, files, links, and program templates</li> <li>Ensure reportability of email marketing campaign results</li> <li>Create database queries and smart lists; manage audiences &amp; segmentations</li> <li>Maintain and optimize email marketing processes</li> <li>Align with central and regional Marketing Operation team members on process, workflows, policies, execution and enablement</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are</strong></p> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <p><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience in email marketing, production and execution within a Digital marketing or marketing operations organization</li> <li>Strong track record using marketing automation tools;<strong> Marketo a must</strong></li> <li>Solid analytical skills and a strong understanding of technical concepts</li> <li>Experienced in HTML and CSS concepts (email and web)</li> <li>Strong service orientation and attention to detail</li> <li>Able to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities simultaneously</li> <li>Solid project management and organizational skills</li> <li>Able to work cross functionally and globally</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p>

jobs.title: Stripe Communications (Open Application)
jobs.description: <h2><strong>Who we are </strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>The Communications team builds and protects Stripe’s brand and influence across the world. And, sure, that’s what most comms teams do. But we do it with a small team of folks dedicated to <a href="https://stripe-comms.lovable.app/">creativity and rigor</a>. We’re looking for unconstrained but strategic thinking, not smooth execution of a rote playbook. Design a microsite, launch a podcast. Get to know the products and our users well, and wield that knowledge wisely. Move from idea to execution quickly. Collaborate openly and egolessly. Along the way, provide strategic counsel to Stripe’s executives, help leaders across the company articulate Stripe’s views on fast-changing areas like agentic commerce and crypto, and write a keynote or two. You’ll have a remit with clear goals; how you go about advancing those goals will be up to you.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>You'll make sure the world gets excited about many of the same things we do: great products and what they can enable for businesses. That'll mean different things at different times: creating a compelling demo, writing a memorable speech, prepping a banger podcast, whatever it takes. And “the world” will also mean different things at different times: a set of YC founders, or Fortune 500 executives, or AI-pilled developers, or VPs of monetization, or any number of other audiences.&nbsp;</p> <p>In general, we've found that the most important skills you'll use a lot are excellent writing, obsessive attention to detail, first-principles thinking, creativity, and resourcefulness. And, of course, a keen curiosity both for the inner workings of Stripe’s most technical products and for how the broader economic landscape is shifting under everyone’s feet.&nbsp;</p> <p>This year, we're hiring differently for some of our permanent roles. Rather than posting narrow job descriptions and screening for exact-fit experience, we want to find people of exceptional caliber and then shape the role to the person. Through the interview process, we’ll work with you to find the right remit for your skills and the right path for your development. We’ll discuss these explicitly and agree on your role together. Regardless of the responsibilities we agree on, we’ll make sure that you touch and lead a wide range of projects in your first few months at Stripe—real work, not training exercises. For folks newer to comms, it’ll be a chance to rapidly cut your teeth; for comms veterans, a chance to learn new skills and gleefully discard old dogma.&nbsp;</p> <p>After that, we revisit responsibilities once a year, tied to annual planning. The goal is to have the best people working on the right things—and then to learn and grow together as things quickly evolve. Which, of course, they will.&nbsp;</p> <p>Stripe's comms team is small, the surface area of what we work on is enormous, and the company is at the forefront of defining the next decade of global commerce. If the prospect of unconstrained but strategic thinking appeals to you, whatever your background, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <p>As we explained above, the exact role and remit may look different depending on your skills, interests, and tenure at Stripe. But here’s a sample set of plausible responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Lead global product communications for one or more of Stripe’s major product areas (e.g., our Money Management suite or our Payments suite).&nbsp;</li> <li>Lead the development, articulation, and testing of Stripe’s long-term public vision and messaging for that product area.</li> <li>Design and roll out strategic campaigns that build awareness for Stripe’s products and deepen key audiences’ understanding of exactly what makes those products to businesses (as well as the value they add to the broader ecosystem or economy).&nbsp;</li> <li>Create and edit extremely high quality written materials for Stripe’s biggest moments, including newsroom posts, social content, industry keynotes, top tier media interviews, and more.&nbsp;</li> <li>Work with local and regional comms leads to raise awareness for Stripe globally.</li> <li>Develop and maintain relationships with top tier reporters, thought leaders, and influencers.</li> <li>Collaborate closely with your counterparts on the partnerships and product marketing teams.</li> <li>Provide strategic counsel to our executive team, including Stripe’s founders and most senior product leaders.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. We value experience, but that doesn’t necessarily mean traditional <em>comms</em> experience. In recent years, our hiring has been 50/50 split between top comms pros and people without any such background, including several former founders. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Superlative writer; someone who has been recognized by their peers as a truly exceptional writer, with a particular knack for making technically sophisticated topics interesting and memorable</li> <li>Experience collaborating effectively with product teams, partnership leads, marketing colleagues, and other senior executives</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience telling the story of a company or its products—including as a founder, a journalist, or even as a seasoned comms professional.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in technology, B2B, financial services and/or banking sectors.&nbsp;</li> <li>You’re passionate about Stripe’s mission and/or the quality of tools that founders, developers, and business leaders around the world have access to</li> <li>You’re deeply immersed in the world of independent media—Substackers, podcasters, video makers, influencers on X. You might personally know some of the people shaping these conversations (or even be one yourself), but more importantly, you understand the culture, the discourse, and where the zeitgeist is heading next. You combine the best of what you’ve found online with your original ideas to create compelling stories and new insights.&nbsp;</li> </ul>

jobs.title: Strategic AI/BI Account Executive
jobs.description: <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">SLSQ327R186</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1648">While candidates in the listed location(s) are encouraged for this role, candidates in other locations will be considered.</p> <ul> <li data-renderer-start-pos="1800">London&nbsp;</li> <li data-renderer-start-pos="1800">Munich</li> <li data-renderer-start-pos="1800">Paris&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>Databricks is seeking a Genie + AI/BI Sales Specialist to help enterprise customers transform how business users interact with data. This high-impact role sits within the AI Go-To-Market team and partners closely with Enterprise Account Executives to drive adoption of Databricks AI/BI and Genie.&nbsp;You will help organizations move beyond static dashboards to governed, conversational, AI-powered analytics at the center of the convergence of business intelligence, data platforms, and generative AI.</p> <p>Enterprise analytics is rapidly evolving from dashboards and static reporting to conversational, AI-driven decision platforms. Databricks AI/BI and Genie empower business users to securely interact with governed data using natural language, transforming the data platform into a true decision platform. If you want to be at the forefront of AI-powered analytics transformation at one of the fastest-growing data and AI companies in the world, this is your opportunity.</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="2006"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">The impact you will have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with Enterprise AEs to identify, qualify, and close AI/BI opportunities</li> <li>Engage C-level, analytics, and line-of-business leaders to modernize analytics strategies</li> <li>Displace or expand legacy BI platforms with AI-powered, governed analytics solutions</li> <li>Lead conversations around semantic governance, self-service analytics, and natural language data access</li> <li>Drive proof-of-value engagements and scale enterprise-wide adoption</li> <li>Align AI/BI initiatives to measurable business outcomes (productivity, speed to insight, revenue impact)</li> <li>Enable field teams and serve as a subject matter expert on modern analytics architectures</li> </ul> <p data-renderer-start-pos="2367"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What we look for:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Enterprise sales experience in BI, analytics, data platforms, or AI/ML</li> <li>Strong understanding of modern analytics architectures and data governance</li> <li>Ability to sell to both technical and business stakeholders</li> <li>Executive presence and experience navigating complex buying cycles</li> <li>Passion for AI and the impact of GenAI on enterprise analytics</li> <li>Experience operating in a specialist or overlay sales model</li> <li>Ability to translate technical capabilities into clear business value</li> <li data-renderer-start-pos="2386">Strong Enterprise Sales experience, exceeding quotas in larger accounts</li> <li data-renderer-start-pos="2386">Bachelors Degree or equivalent experience&nbsp;</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>About Databricks</strong></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, sans-serif;">Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(255, 54, 33);"><a style="color: rgb(255, 54, 33);" href="https://twitter.com/databricks" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://twitter.com/databricks&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1700237575733000&amp;usg=AOvVaw03FL8fJvOD97ytN02f5G2C">Twitter</a>,&nbsp;<a style="color: rgb(255, 54, 33);" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1700237575733000&amp;usg=AOvVaw15dLk3q8VxTfHEgCUg7NSt">LinkedIn</a>&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">and</span>&nbsp;<a style="color: rgb(255, 54, 33);" href="https://www.facebook.com/databricksinc" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.facebook.com/databricksinc&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1700237575733000&amp;usg=AOvVaw39EcncitnlqV72EG2-RqXJ">Facebook</a></span>.<br><br><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong></span>At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click <a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/154un3e8Xav4BceOSlcYFZRGEuQI54xMxVydRwQn54eQ/edit?usp=sharing">here</a>.<br><br></p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion</strong></p> <p>At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.</p> <p><strong>Compliance</strong></p> <p><strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">If access to export-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.</span></strong></p></div>

jobs.title: Implementation Consultant, Embedded Finance
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Implementation at Brex</strong></p> <p>Implementation transforms new customers into power users. We lead the onboarding experience for companies adopting Brex Empower, helping them shift from outdated processes to a modern, employee-first approach. It’s a role that blends customer empathy, project management, technical expertise, process design, and change management. We take personal ownership of our customers' long-term success, and we set customers up thoroughly so they can be with ‘Brex for life’. As strategic advisors, we build trust, drive solutions with tenacity, deliver results fast, and work cross-functionally to make adoption seamless for customers.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>Embedded is Brex's most strategically important growth frontier and this role sits at the epicenter. You'll sit on the Implementation Team and will wire together partner ecosystems across Business Development and Product, configure complex integrations, and deliver customer experiences that genuinely delight. You won't be following a playbook, you’ll be writing it. This role focuses on ensuring successful onboarding and configuration of embedded services such as Navan, Zip, Coupa Cards, and ICCP partnerships.</p> <p><strong>Where you’ll work</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in our Vancouver office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require a minimum of three coordinated days in the office per week, Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead implementation work streams for embedded services across all customer segments</li> <li>Own end-to-end implementation for embedded-only customer projects (27 Navan, 46 Zip forecasted H2 deals). Partner with the BD team on net-new embedded partnership launches helping define how Brex integrates with the next generation of platforms.</li> <li>Configure embedded services in coordination with partner tech specs and Brex.</li> <li>Provide consultative guidance to customers to ensure embedded tools are correctly deployed.</li> <li>Maintain deep knowledge of embedded product evolution and serve as the internal authority, educating CSMs, VIP Support, and cross-functional teams.</li> <li>Success is measured by on-time and high-quality delivery for forecasted embedded deals, reduced escalations or partner configuration issues, and positive feedback from partner and cross-functional stakeholders.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience: 2+ years in SaaS implementation, integration, or technical consulting you've navigated complex deployments and have the wins to show for it.</li> <li>Domain Knowledge: Familiarity with embedded finance or third-party SaaS integrations you understand how these ecosystems fit together and where friction hides.</li> <li>Communication: A natural communicator who can translate technical complexity into clear, confident guidance for Brex customers, partners, and internal stakeholders.</li> <li>Execution: Highly organized and comfortable managing multiple concurrent projects in a fast-moving environment where no two implementations look the same.</li> <li>Mindset: Energized by ambiguity. You thrive when the product is evolving and the partnership landscape is expanding.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p>The expected salary range for this role is $105,600 - $132,000 CAN.&nbsp; However, the starting base pay will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.</p> <p>Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One, N.A.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Outbound Sales Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Sales at Brex</strong></p> <p>Sales is the growth engine at Brex. We bring in new customers, expand existing relationships, and drive the company’s bottom line. With unlimited territories and uncapped opportunity, your ambition sets the ceiling. We win together, celebrate often, and reward performance. If you want to sell a category-defining product with real ownership, this is your team.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">As a Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for prospecting and identifying new customers for Brex. You will partner with Account Executives to help businesses understand the value of Brex as a financial services solution and the rewards that it provides fast growing companies. We’re rapidly growing our team which requires a “whatever it takes” attitude, a high sense of urgency, and a passion for sales. As an SDR at Brex, you will have the opportunity to help create processes and build pipelines for $1 million deals immediately.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>Where you’ll work</strong><br><br>This role will be based in our Vancouver office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require three days per week in office - Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!<br></span></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Identify growing companies that would gain value from Brex&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Prospect companies that are growing and spending; educate them on our modern corporate card and spend management software</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Navigate through a conversation flow to uncover business needs, understand pains, and position Brex as a compelling solution</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Maintain and update an accurate log of activity in the CRM system</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Hit daily KPIs across a variety of touch points: email, phone, social</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Use email to correspond with leads to follow up and/or to confirm appointments</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Provide feedback to others in department related to information prospects share that could be helpful in advertising/marketing as well as our overall programs</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Experience in a general sales role OR a related field in hospitality, customer service, etc.</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">The ability to proactively engage new clients through email and phone</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">A high sense of urgency coupled with an ability to adapt and pivot in every conversation</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Strong communication skills to passionately and clearly articulate the value of Brex</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Work with Marketing Operations to define, execute, and optimize prospecting approaches through A/B tests</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">A team-player attitude with a desire to improve internal processes beyond your day-to-day tasks</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">A desire to learn, grow, and launch your career at a cutting-edge financial technology company&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">SaaS or B2B experience&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Experience with Salesforce, Outreach, and/or ZoomInfo</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Demonstrated ability to exceed impact &amp; activity quotas&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p>The expected OTE range for this role is $73,040 - $82,170 CAD. The starting wage will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. This OTE range reflects a standard work week, however, as an hourly employee if you exceed these hours, you will be paid overtime. The OTE figure listed here includes base compensation and commissions, which may or may not be earned depending on performance.&nbsp; Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation.<br><br></p> <div id="te-floating-button-container"></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Account Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>About the Role</strong></span></p> <p style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">The Account Development Representative (ADR) job is the launching point for an individual looking for a successful career in SaaS sales. In this role, you will be at the front of Samsara’s go-to-market strategy. This includes hunting for leads, mapping enterprise accounts, and building demand for Samsara’s full line of products. This role is ideal for individuals looking to develop enterprise technology sales skills and to advance their careers. Successful ADRs earn accelerated commissions and head down the path for promotion into closing roles. You will work closely with top-tier executives and will see up close how sales organizations succeed.&nbsp;<br><br><strong><span data-sheets-root="1">This is a hybrid position based in our Mexico City office.</span></strong></span></p> <p style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You should apply if:&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <ul style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world:&nbsp;</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</span></span></li> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You are the architect of your own career:&nbsp;</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. Successful ADRs can see promotion to a closing role in two years or less.</span></span></li> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You love talking to people:&nbsp;</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">In this role you will average 80+ calls to prospective customers daily.</span></span></li> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You have innate curiosity in how businesses work:&nbsp;</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">One day you’ll meet with someone in waste management and the next you may be learning about the inner workings of a food distribution center. Our top sales team members seek to learn the ins and outs of the businesses they support in order to make a larger impact.</span></span></li> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You treat rejection as a learning experience:</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">&nbsp;In this role, you will get hung up on and you will get told no. You need to have resilience to pick up the phone again and again to sell Samsara’s mission.</span></span></li> <li style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>You want to be with the best:&nbsp;</strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">Samsara’s high-performance Sales culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before</span></span></li> </ul> <p style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></span></p> <ul style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Roboto, 'sans-serif'; font-size: 16px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: normal;"> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">High level of interest in the IoT space</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Excitement around growing a sales career</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Comfortability in a dynamic, customer facing environment</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Previous cold calling experience</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Motivation to be in a goal-oriented, quota-carrying role</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Excellent interpersonal skills</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Ability to communicate with a high degree of clarity and professionalism in English (both verbally and in writing) to build rapport and effectively resolve inquiries for our US customer base.</li> </ul> <p><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">#LI-Hybrid</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Administrative Assistant (Legal Team)
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Legal Administrative Assistant based in our Mexico City office. This role sits within our global Legal Operations team and will support the administrative function of the entire Samsara legal team by handling a wide range of administrative tasks, ensuring smooth daily operations, and contributing to the legal operations function globally, including in Mexico, the United States, Canada, Europe, and India. The ideal candidate will possess a keen understanding of legal administrative work, great attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>This is a hybrid position requiring 3 days per week in our Mexico City office and 2 days working remotely. Relocation assistance will not be provided for this role.</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world:</strong> Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, reduce emissions, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career:</strong> If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. We set up our employees for success and have built a culture that encourages rapid career development, countless opportunities to experiment and master your craft in a hyper growth environment.</li> <li><strong>You’re energized by our opportunity:</strong> The vision we have to digitize large sectors of the global economy requires your full focus and best efforts to bring forth creative, ambitious ideas for our customers.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best:</strong> At Samsara, we win together, celebrate together and support each other. You will be surrounded by a high-caliber team that will encourage you to do your best.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Support the administrative function for the Samsara Legal Operations team</li> <li>Support legal team request intake queues, ensuring prompt and accurate resolution of inquiries, requests, and tasks</li> <li>Provide general administrative support for the entire legal team (including in Mexico, the United States, Canada, Europe, and India), including, but not limited to, redlining contracts, document management, coordination and preparation (filing, signing), general correspondence, and administrative tasks</li> <li>Support and improve administrative workflows across the legal team and cross-functionally</li> <li>Maintain and organize legal databases and systems</li> <li>Manage updates to contractual and policy templates and support related workflows</li> <li>Facilitate communication and collaboration amongst the global legal team</li> <li>Provide administrative support for special projects and initiatives as needed</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s values (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years of administrative, operations and/or legal support experience</li> <li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills in both Spanish and English</li> <li>This position will be based in Mexico City and will be a hybrid role – the candidate will be expected to be in the office at least 3 days per week.</li> <li>Ability to support US (EST/PST) business hours as needed</li> <li>Demonstrated success in managing team inboxes/queues, coordinating tasks, and meeting deadlines within a dynamic work environment</li> <li>Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines with accuracy</li> <li>Discretion while handling confidential legal information</li> <li>Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Suite</li> <li>Proficient with AI tooling, including designing and improving AI powered workflows</li> <li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>In-house, technology company, law firm, or notary public experience</li> <li>Legal management and enterprise software experience (i.e., Zendesk, Ironclad, Slack, Google Drive, Adobe, Brightflag, etc.)</li> <li>Knowledge of legal terminology, practices, and documentation</li> <li>Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with a focus on team collaboration</li> <li>Adaptability and a proactive mindset to navigate changing priorities and thrive in a fast-paced, innovative environment</li> <li>Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment<br><br>#LIHybrid</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara’s <a href="https://www.samsara.com/legal/candidate-privacy-notice">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> for more information.</p> <p><strong>Fraudulent Employment Offers</strong></p> <p>Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us-greenhouse-mail.io or @mail3.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our&nbsp;<a href="https://samsara.com/blog/avoiding-fake-job-offers">blog post here</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Customer Success Specialist - Commercial/Mid-Market Collections
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>We are looking for a self-starting, motivated, and experienced <strong>Customer Success Specialist - CML/MM Collections </strong>to support the small business globally. This role manages the accounts receivable efforts of a global portfolio of monthly customers and acts as a key liaison between Sales, customers, and internal teams, ensuring clear communication of account status and timely resolution of issues.</p> <p>The ideal candidate has a high-volume, accounts-centric mindset, strong attention to detail, and excellent problem-solving skills. You thrive in a fast-paced environment, can manage multiple priorities, and approach collections with a customer-first, solution-oriented mindset that supports both delinquency reduction and long-term customer retention.</p> <p><strong>This is a remote position open to candidates residing in Mexico.</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world: </strong>Every phone call you answer and every email you send, can affect whether truck drivers deliver goods on time and without accidents, whether students get dropped off safely from school, or whether power gets restored quickly after a natural disaster.</li> <li><strong>You thrive the most when solving problems:</strong> Our constantly expanding technology and the complexities faced by our customers provide an exciting range of challenges for our Customer Success teams. With a growth mindset and a desire to learn, you will strategically partner with our customers to find unique solutions to help keep their operations safe, efficient, and sustainable.</li> <li><strong>You are a natural relationship builder: </strong>Whether the relationship is with our customers or with cross-functional teams in Samsara, you are in constant communication and collaboration with key stakeholders to win as a team.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career:</strong> If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. This Customer Success team is still shaping its future, and you will have plenty of autonomy and opportunities to master your craft in a hyper-growth environment.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>At Samsara, we win together, celebrate together, and support each other. You will be surrounded by the best and brightest professionals out there.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Manage a portfolio of global customers, supporting overall account health through billing, receivables, and service-related inquiries.</li> <li>Serve as a primary point of contact for customers on billing questions, contract renewals, cancellations, and account-related concerns.</li> <li>Perform consistent collections activities to support timely payment of current and past-due accounts while maintaining a customer-first approach.</li> <li>Resolve customer issues and escalations that may impact payment or account status, partnering cross-functionally to drive timely resolution.</li> <li>Prioritize and manage a dynamic work queue, balancing backlog, ongoing follow-ups, and incoming customer requests.</li> <li>Deliver a high-quality customer experience from initial inquiry through final resolution, ensuring clear communication and accurate account management.</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>1+ to 3 years of experience in a customer-facing role within a contact center, customer success, or B2B collections environment.</li> <li>Experience working in a fast-paced, high-volume environment, managing <strong>20+ cases per day via phone and email</strong> while handling escalated or time-sensitive customer interactions.</li> <li>Knowledge of <strong>operational accounts receivable processes</strong>, including billing inquiries, past-due account management, and basic reconciliation concepts.</li> <li>Strong problem-solving skills and critical thinking ability, with the capacity to follow established processes and contribute to scalable solutions.</li> <li>Highly organized and self-disciplined, with exceptional attention to detail, follow-through, and the ability to meet deadlines and SLAs.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally with a wide range of customers and internal partners.</li> <li>Proficiency using <strong>macOS</strong> and experience working with ticketing or CRM systems (e.g., Zendesk, Salesforce, Service Cloud, NetSuite).</li> <li><strong>Ability to work remotely from Mexico.</strong></li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience supporting service requests in billing, RMA, cancellations, and renewals</li> <li>Experience supporting telematics systems, ELDs, and hours of service compliance is a plus</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>This is a dynamic, high energy role in which you will bring the Internet of Things to mid-sized customers, building Samsara's business and bringing the benefits of sensor data to customers. Typical sales will be $20k to $100k, and involve POCs, multiple stakeholders, managing trials, multi-faceted pricing negotiations, and selling to executives and CXOs.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong><span data-sheets-root="1">This is a remote position, open to candidates based in Mexico. </span></strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world: </strong>Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>Your mantra is #alwaysbeprospecting:</strong> The world of operations is vast. Your customers are often out in the field and the best way to catch them is live on the phone. Samsara’s top reps do constant research to find companies and contacts to expand their pipeline.</li> <li><strong>You have innate curiosity in how businesses work:</strong> One day you’ll meet with someone in waste management and the next you may be learning about the inner workings of a food distribution center. Our top sales team members seek to learn the ins and outs of the businesses they support in order to make a larger impact.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You are a life-long learner: </strong>Samsara sales are complex. You will need to learn about businesses where you previously had little knowledge. The payoff is big but you have to be willing to put in the work.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>You build genuine relationships with your customers: </strong>The industries we serve have relied on pen-and-paper solutions for years and haven’t been met with the type of technology we offer. Our customers value earned trust and human relationships built over time.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>Samsara’s high-performance Sales culture means you’ll be surrounded by the best and challenged to go farther than you have before.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for this role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years experience in a full-cycle, closing sales role</li> <li>Experience independently closing new deals larger than $10,000 in annual revenue.</li> <li>Spanish speaker required (verbal and written)</li> <li>Must be located in Mexico</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Proven track record of consistent quota achievement</li> <li>Experience selling in the midmarket space - medium to large deals sizes</li> <li>Experience with high-volume cold calling</li> <li>Must demonstrate a growth mindset and a willingness to be collaborative with your teammates and in your selling process</li> <li>SFDC familiarity</li> <li>Experience selling into Mexico or Latin America</li> <li>Ability to think strategically and creatively in a new market</li> <li>Excellent understanding of business acumen for emerging markets</li> <li>Ability to manage logistics of selling into Mexico from North America</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities.
